text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, October 13. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
